title: What I've Been Hiding
description:
I'm happy to announce TC Carson, the voice of Mace Windu in the Clone Wars and Kratos in God of War will be voicing Mace Windu in the Vader Fan film. This has been a dream come true and there is still much more to announce.
We will also be releasing TC signature series sabers inspired by many characters he's played...yes...YOUR SON HAS RETURNED.

to support this project, please grab a hoodie, now back in stock
